name: goalnight
description: Set a goal, go to bed, wake up to a PR. An overnight goal-execution layer for Codex /goal mode.

interface.longDescription: goalnight extends Codex's /goal mode to run reliably overnight. It auto-resumes when your token quota refreshes (so you don't waste the quota that refreshes while you sleep), surfaces decisions that need your call, and shows a cozy morning brief when you wake up.
